title: Boerlagiodendron moluccanum
taxonomy: Boerlagiodendron moluccanum is classified as a species of tree in the family Anacardiaceae. It belongs to the genus Boerlagiodendron, which is a group of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. The species Boerlagiodendron moluccanum is further classified as part of the order Sapindales, a group of plants that includes other related species. Boerlagiodendron moluccanum is also classified as a type of evergreen tree, indicating that it retains its leaves throughout the year. This classification is based on the plant's botanical characteristics and its relationship to other species within the Anacardiaceae family.
